page.title: Runbook
page.description: Runbook turns install, config, and service control into one executable path. Use this page to review the current blocker, ordered steps, and navigation shortcuts.

context.empty: There is no clear blocker right now, so you can continue directly to the relevant page.

launchChecks.title: Launch Checks
launchChecks.subtitle: These checks decide whether setup can continue cleanly from install to dashboard.

stepList.title: Guided Workflow
stepList.subtitle: Follow the ordered steps below. The active step reflects the current blocker chain.

preview.bannerSummary: Read-only preview. Run inside the desktop shell to use install, logs, config and service control.
preview.bannerActionDescription: Currently in browser preview mode ({{time}}). Switch to the desktop shell to continue local install and service control.
preview.headline: Next: Switch to desktop mode
preview.summary: The current environment cannot run local commands. Open ClawDesk desktop first, then continue with install, config and startup.
preview.blockerDetail: Browser preview can only show the UI — it cannot install, write API Keys or start the Gateway.

checks.install: Preview mode does not detect local OpenClaw CLI or npm status.
checks.config: Preview mode does not read the real OpenClaw config file.
checks.service: Preview mode does not detect local Gateway status.
checks.runtime: Browser preview cannot access the Rust command bridge.
checks.settings: Preview mode only shows the structure; it does not read local ClawDesk settings.

steps.install: Switch to desktop mode first — install requires local execution.
steps.config: Switch to desktop mode first — config files need local read/write.
steps.service: Switch to desktop mode first — service status needs local control.
steps.dashboard: Only preview is available — cannot open a working local Dashboard.

preview.supportPrimary: First confirm how to enter the desktop runtime, then continue.
preview.supportSettings: Come here to check the current runtime environment diagnostics.

runtimeUnavailable.bannerSummary: The desktop window is open but the frontend cannot reach the host command bridge. Fix this first — local commands and file operations are unavailable.
runtimeUnavailable.bannerActionDescription: Desktop window is open but the command bridge is unavailable. Checked at {{time}}.
runtimeUnavailable.headline: Next: Fix desktop runtime bridge
runtimeUnavailable.summary: The desktop window is open but the local command bridge is disconnected, so install, config and startup cannot proceed.
runtimeUnavailable.blockerDetail: Desktop shell detected, but the host command bridge is unavailable — local commands cannot be accessed.

checks.install: Cannot install, probe CLI or run managed install until the command bridge is restored.
checks.config: Cannot read or write local OpenClaw config until the command bridge is restored.
checks.service: Cannot query or control Gateway until the command bridge is restored.
checks.settings: Cannot read local ClawDesk settings until the command bridge is restored.

steps.install: Fix the runtime bridge first — install requires local execution.
steps.config: Fix the runtime bridge first — config files need local read/write.
steps.service: Fix the runtime bridge first — service status needs local control.
steps.dashboard: Fix the runtime bridge first — then Dashboard can open normally.

runtimeUnavailable.supportPrimary: Restore the desktop command bridge first, then continue the workflow.
runtimeUnavailable.supportLogs: If you encounter issues fixing the desktop runtime, check the error logs here.
runtimeUnavailable.supportSettings: Check runtime diagnostics, bridge status and local path information.
